source.notes: Redacted sample trace for fixture conversion workflow validation.

turns.user_input: What changed in the termination section between v2 and v3?
turns.assistant_output: Termination notice was reduced to 30 days and immediate termination for material breach was added.
turns.expected_output: The notice period changed from 60 days (v2) to 30 days (v3), and v3 adds immediate termination for material breach.

rubric.accept_criteria: Must mention 60 to 30 day change and the new material breach right.

available_documents.content: Section 8.1 (v3): Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice. Immediate termination is allowed for material breach.
Section 7.1 (v2): Either party may terminate with 60 days written notice.

turns.user_input: Summarize the risk in one sentence for partner review.
turns.assistant_output: Risk increased because immediate termination for material breach now exists and the cure window is shorter.

available_documents.excerpt: Immediate termination right can increase termination exposure during disputes.

redaction.notes: Sample created from synthetic redacted text; no live customer data included.
